createWrappedToken(address).details: Reverts if a wrapper has already been created for the BPT, or if the pool has not been initialized.

params.balancerPoolToken: The Balancer pool token to wrap

getVault().details: This contract uses the Vault to verify that the token being wrapped is a valid Balancer pool, and that it has been initialized.

returns._0: wrappedToken The wrapped token address (or zero, if no wrapper has been created)

createWrappedToken(address).notice: Creates a wrapped token for the given Balancer pool token.

getVault().notice: Get the address of the Balancer Vault.

getWrappedToken(address).notice: Gets the wrapped token for the given Balancer pool token.
